what: Implement archive administration view with restore action and explicit invalid-path status rendering that prevents activating invalid projects from selector interactions.

where.description: Render archived project list and restore actions.
Render explicit invalid-path status in project lists/selectors.
Add tests for restore flow and invalid activation guard behavior.

acceptance.then: Project is removed from archived list and appears in active catalog after refresh.

acceptance.given: A project flagged as invalid path
acceptance.then: Activation action is blocked and UI shows explicit non-activable status.

context: Users need recovery operations for archived projects and clear handling of broken repo paths.
technicalNotes: Status must be derived from API data, not local heuristics. Merge-safe: isolated page/components/tests in projects feature. Models: Codex gpt-5.3-codex (high), Claude Opus 4.6 (high).
